rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDWARD M. PLOUSHA JR.
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to july 11, 2017. no file stamped hard copy of the 2nd amended petition delivered to the examiner and new POS of the NOH for the 2nd amended petition must be filed. notice of a petition cannot be filed contemporaneously with the pleading requiring notice as the document cannot be served until AFTER it is filed. therefore, a statement under penalty of perjury that the document was served prior to the filing of that document is invalid notice. new deadline for providing the courtesy copy in order to avoid an automatic continuance is wednesday, july 5, 2017. please note-->faxed or emailed copies are NOT accepted.
